_comment: Optional airband receiver config for maia-httpd. Copy to /root/airband.json on the Pluto. If absent, maia-httpd uses these same built-in defaults. samp_rate MUST be the value the channelizer was built for (audio rate = samp_rate / 128 / 7 = 15625 sps at 14 MHz). channels_hz: up to 21 absolute channel centers, all within center_hz +/- samp_rate/2.
